title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Britain Is Finding It So Hard To Deport A Pakistani 'Grooming Gang' Leader
summary_full: Shabir Ahmed, a UK-Pakistan dual national, lost his British citizenship after his conviction more than two decades ago. Now, Pakistan is refusing to take him back.
